text:
Created attachment 251892
Screenshot of the "edit this page" link

The "edit this page" link in the FreeBSD Handbook (and other books as well) is broken. It leads to a 404 not found page on GitHub.

1) Go to any book (I used https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/)

2) Click on the "edit this page" link.

Actual results:

Link goes to https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blob/main/documentation/content/en/_index

Expected results:

Link goes to the source of the page I'm currently browsing in the book.
